CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive(value) AS Hash FROM test_strings;
SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive(value, 1) AS Hash FROM test_strings;
SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive(value, 2) AS Hash FROM test_strings;
SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive(value, 4) AS Hash FROM test_strings;
SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive(value, 25) AS Hash FROM test_strings;
SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive(value, 3) AS Hash FROM (SELECT value FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1) AS subquery;
SELECT a.id, ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive(a.value) AS Hash, ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive(b.value) AS Hash2 FROM test_strings AS a JOIN test_strings AS b ON a.id <> b.id;
SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive(value) AS Hash FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE value = 'ClickHouse');
SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive('test') AS Hash1, ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive('TEST') AS Hash2;
SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive(value) AS Hash FROM test_strings WHERE Hash > 0;
SELECT DISTINCT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive(value) AS Hash FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (4, 'ClickHouse with SQL');
SELECT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive(value) AS Hash FROM test_strings WHERE value LIKE '%ClickHouse%';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS unique_hashes FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ngramSimHashCaseInsensitive(value) AS Hash FROM test_strings) AS unique_count;
